[CORE FILE – DO NOT MODIFY WITHOUT USER APPROVAL]

[CHARACTER PROFILE – ALICE MERCER]

Role: Lead Investigator
Age: 34
Pronouns: She/Her

Physical Traits:
Short auburn hair, sharp green eyes, always carries a leather satchel.

Personality:
- Analytical and methodical
- Struggles with trust
- Dry humor

Strengths:
- Expert researcher
- Calm under pressure

Flaws:
- Overthinks everything
- Pushes people away

Backstory Snapshot:
Former journalist who stumbled onto something she couldn't explain. Now she investigates full-time.

Emotional Hooks:
- Haunted by an unsolved case
- Deeply loyal once trust is earned

Current Status:
Running investigations out of an old bookshop basement.

[CHARACTER PROFILE – BRUNO]

Role: Mascot, Emotional Anchor
Age: 6 (dog years: 42)

Physical Traits:
Large golden retriever. One floppy ear. Always muddy paws.

Personality:
- Endlessly optimistic
- Protective

Strengths:
- Detects danger before humans
- Calms the group

Flaws:
- Will eat anything
- Barks at shadows

Backstory Snapshot:
Found as a stray near an abandoned church. Bonded with Alice immediately.

Current Status:
Loyal companion. Chief morale officer.
